articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: 'Lee Cronin's The Mummy' is no match for 'Super Mario' or 'Hail Mary' at the box office - NBC News
articles.description: “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie” and “Project Hail Mary” dominated the North American box office again this weekend, leaving “Lee Cronin’s The Mummy” in third place for its debut
articles.content:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie and Project Hail Mary dominated the North American box office again this weekend, leaving Lee Cronins The Mummy in third place for its debut.
